---
title: "Pregnancy and the seafood demand response: Evidence from household scanner data"
date: 2026-03-017
author:
  - name: Roberto Cárdenas-Retamal
    orcid: 0000-0002-9578-827X
    affiliation: School of Forest, Fisheries, & Geomatics Sciences, University of Florida
 
categories:
  - Pregnancy
  - Seafood
  - Diet change
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    “Pregnancy and the seafood demand response: Evidence from household scanner data”
#  links:
 # - name: Code
  #  url: https://github.com/vincentarelbundock/mfxplainer
  #  icon: fa-brands fa-github
pub-status: 
  status: Writing
  class: warning
  icon: "fa-solid fa-pencil"
  

---

# Abstract
